candidates.why: Explicit current maturities of long-term debt and excludes lease liabilities; best clean debt-specific current portion from shortlist.

Current Bank Loans line exists in the current liabilities section and represents short-term borrowings, but the label also appears in non-current liabilities, so by label alone it is ambiguous across periods/sheets preview.

Current Mortgage Loans line exists in the current liabilities section and represents short-term borrowings/current debt, but the same label also appears in non-current liabilities so label-only mapping is somewhat ambiguous.

variables.notes: R:nc. A broader STD measure may also require current short-term borrowings such as current Bank Loans and Mortgage Loans, but those labels also appear in non-current liabilities, creating ambiguity if mapped by exact row label only. Chose the clean explicit current-maturities debt line from the shortlist and flagged for review.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current tax liabilities line.
